query: SELECT u.id, u.name, up.dayMasterElement, up.dayPillar, up.favorableElements, up.unfavorableElements, up.birthDate FROM users u LEFT JOIN user_profiles up ON u.id = up.userId ORDER BY u.id LIMIT 5;
